class.name: ResonanceStaticScene
class.brief_description: Scene-level component holding the exported static geometry for bake and runtime. Analog to Unity's SteamAudioStaticMesh.
class.description: ResonanceStaticScene holds the merged static geometry asset produced by Export Meshes to Steam Audio. The bake uses only this asset (excluding dynamic objects). At runtime, the static scene is loaded from this asset; static ResonanceGeometry nodes skip adding themselves when a valid asset is present.

members.member: The exported merged static mesh. Assigned automatically by Export Meshes to Steam Audio.
Scene name at export time (for reference).
